summary: CP5 validator passed: plan generation returns ordered typed steps, write actions are classified correctly, refinement increments version, and the plan persists in DB and UI.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Plan with ordered steps
checks.expected: >= 2 steps with action_type, read_or_write, target, estimated_count, risk_level
checks.actual: plan-f9f68de2 returned 3 ordered steps with all required fields

checks.name: CHECK-02: Write action classification
checks.expected: JOIN_GROUP is WRITE with MEDIUM/HIGH risk
checks.actual: write-step-id is JOIN_GROUP with read_or_write=WRITE and risk_level=HIGH

checks.name: CHECK-03: NL refinement + versioning
checks.actual: version=2 with step count reduced from 3 to 2

checks.name: CHECK-04: Plan in DB
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db "SELECT plan_id, version, status FROM plans WHERE plan_id='plan-f9f68de2';"

checks.name: CHECK-06: PlanPage UI write action highlight
checks.actual: PlanPage renders 'Write Action' label and plan-step-write styling
